meta.title: haru — Voice-first cross-language dating
meta.description: Your message arrives in their language, spoken in your own voice. Hear before you swipe.

hero.title: Your voice, in their language.
hero.subtitle: Hear a voice intro before you swipe. The messages you send arrive translated — and spoken in your own cloned voice.

mockup.name: Aiko, 27
mockup.intro: Which café are you at today?

crossLanguage.title: Break the language wall. Keep the voice.
crossLanguage.body: Not a robot reading your text. Your message is synthesized in your own ElevenLabs voice clone — tone, breath, and accent come through intact.
crossLanguage.bullet1: Your voice, synthesized via ElevenLabs eleven_v3
crossLanguage.bullet2: Translation by Vertex AI Gemini 2.5 Flash

mockup.mineText: Beautiful weather today — want to take a walk?
mockup.translatedText: 今日は天気がとても良いですね、散歩しませんか?
mockup.caption: Same waveform = same voice. Only the language changes.

slowDating.title: Slowness, on purpose.
slowDating.subtitle: The opposite of instant matching. Showing less up front gives a first impression room to grow.

discover.label: Discover
discover.title: Hear first, look later.
discover.body: Photos stay blurred while the voice intro plays. We dial back the pure-photo filter loop on purpose.

message.label: Messages
message.title: Listen before you read.
message.body: Incoming messages stay sealed like a letter. Playing the audio once is what unlocks the translated text. The voice is the start of the meeting.

photo.label: Photos
photo.title: Photos open with the chat.
photo.body: After 5 exchanges you see part of their photo. At 10, it's fully revealed. Connection is paced by conversation, not by a paywall.

persona.title: Korean men × Japanese women.
persona.body: Real-world unions between the two countries are climbing fast. haru is built on top of that flow, for the pair where language is the only wall left.

cta.title: Try haru.
cta.body: iOS and Android, both. Sign-up is done once you record your voice intro.
cta.disclaimer: Must be 18 or older to use haru.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy — haru
privacy.description: How haru collects, uses, retains, and shares your data with third parties.

terms.title: Terms of Service — haru
terms.description: Terms of use, member obligations, content moderation, and liability for haru.

legal.localeNotice: Only the Korean source text is currently available. Translations will be provided after launch.

authCallback.title: Your email has been verified.
authCallback.body: Head back to the haru app and sign in.
